name: contextshield
description: Local PII/secret scrubbing and prompt enhancement before you send text to AI (Cursor, Copilot, etc.).

contextshield.scrubbing.pii.description: Detect and redact PII before prompt enhancement.

contextshield.scrubbing.secrets.description: Detect and redact secrets (API keys, tokens) before prompt enhancement.

contextshield.scrubbing.entropyThreshold.description: Shannon entropy threshold for flagging high-entropy tokens as secrets.

contextshield.scrubbing.customPatterns.description: Additional regex patterns for secret detection.

contextshield.llm.model.description: Hugging Face model id for local ONNX inference (transformers.js).

contextshield.llm.systemPrompt.description: Override default system prompt for enhancement. Empty uses built-in default.

contextshield.llm.maxNewTokens.description: Maximum new tokens for the enhanced prompt output.

contextshield.audit.logToOutputChannel.description: Write ContextShield events to the VS Code Output Channel.
